name: Arcane Assembly
short_description: Arcane Assembly is a fantasy metroidvania where you create spells using a visual programming language. Unlock new instructions, upgrade your powers, and fight epic bosses on your journey to becoming the most powerful wizard who ever lived.
detailed_description:
Arcane Assembly is a fantasy metroidvania where you create spells using a visual programming language. Unlock new instructions, upgrade your powers, and fight epic bosses on your journey to becoming the most powerful wizard who ever lived.



Develop powerful spells using a visual scripting language. Hundreds of meaningfully unique spell combinations let you express yourself and your creativity through the game.

Explore natural environments


Explore remote jungle villages, treacherous lava caves, and the furthest reaches of the desert on your quest to gain magical power and knowledge.

Upgrade your powers


Unlock new instructions as you play. Each new instruction meaningfully increases the number of spells you can create.
Upgrade your strength and mana to defeat stronger enemies.
In Arcane Assembly, knowledge is power.
